title: High-intensity focused electromagnetic therapy for hypogonadism and associated systems
abstract: Embodiments provide a device for treating hypogonadism, the device including: a. seat, where the seat includes a pair of longitudinal grooves, and a pair of applicators. Each applicator is configured to deliver HIFEM energy and RF energy. The pair of longitudinal grooves are configured to engage the pair of applicators, where the applicators are slidably engaged to move along the longitudinal grooves from a disengaged position to an engaged position against a patient's body for treating hypogonadism. The pair of applicators includes a front applicator configured to engage a patient's penis and a front portion of the patient's pelvic floor and a rear applicator configured to engage a patient's anus and a rear portion of the patient's pelvic floor, intlie engaged position. When in the engaged position, the front applicator and the rear applicator are configured to deliver the HIFEM and RF energies to the patient's pelvic floor muscles for treating the patient's hypogonadism.
claims:
Claims Attorney Docket No.: 0007553.000004 CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A device for treating hypogonadism, comprising: a seat, the seat comprising a pair of longitudinal grooves; and a pair of applicators, wherein each applicator is configured to deliver High-Intensity Focused Electromagnetic Technology (HIFEM) energy and Radio Frequency (RF) energy, wherein the pair of longitudinal grooves are configured to engage the pair of applicators, the applicators slidably engaged to move along the longitudinal grooves from a disengaged position to an engaged position against a patient芒聙聶s body for treating hypogonadism, wherein the pair of applicators comprises a front applicator configured to engage a patient芒聙聶s penis and a front portion of the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor and a rear applicator configured to engage a patient芒聙聶s anus and a rear portion of the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor, in the engaged position, and wherein, when in the engaged position, the front applicator and the rear applicator are configured to deliver the HIFEM and RF energies to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles for treating the patient芒聙聶s hypogonadism. 2. The device of claim 1, wherein the seat further comprises a seat applicator, the seat applicator being configured to deliver HIFEM and RF energies. 3. The device of claims 1 or 2, wherein, when the device is in the engaged position, the seat applicator is configured to deliver the HIEFM and RF energies to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles for treating the patient芒聙聶s hypogonadism. 4. The device of any of claims 1-3, wherein the seat applicator, the front applicator and the rear applicator are each configured to deliver the HIFEM and RF energies concurrently to the muscles and fat tissues of the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles. 5. The device of any of claims 1-4, wherein the seat applicator, the front applicator, and the rear applicator are each configured to concurrently deliver the HIFEM energy pulsed at between 1Hz to 500 Hz with a continuous application of RF energy in the range of 1 MHz to 3 MHz. -21- IM-#10424560.1 

 Attorney Docket No.: 0007553.000004 6. The device of any of claims 1-5, further comprising: a control panel comprising a patient-operated button configured to terminate the delivery of the HIFEM and RF energies, when the patient experiences discomfort during treatment. 7. The device of claim 4, wherein the seat applicator, the front applicator, and the rear applicator are each configured to deliver the HIFEM energy and RF energy for a duration of 10 to 30 minutes long, depending on the patient芒聙聶s comfort level. 8. The device of any of claims 1-7, wherein the front applicator and the rear applicator are designed to accommodate the contour of the male pelvic area, ensuring accurate positioning and delivery of focused electromagnetic waves to the patient芒聙聶s testicular region and boosting testosterone. 9. A method for treating hypogonadism, the method using a device, comprising: a seat, the seat comprising a pair of longitudinal grooves; and a pair of applicators, wherein each applicator is configured to deliver High-Intensity Focused Electromagnetic Technology (HIFEM) energy and Radio Frequency (RF) energy, wherein the pair of longitudinal grooves are configured to engage the pair of applicators, the applicators slidably engaged to move along the longitudinal grooves from a disengaged position to an engaged position against a patient芒聙聶s body for treating hypogonadism, wherein the pair of applicators comprises a front applicator configured to engage a patient芒聙聶s penis and a front portion of the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor and a rear applicator configured to engage a patient芒聙聶s anus and a rear portion of the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor, in the engaged position, and wherein, when in the engaged position, the front applicator and the rear applicator are configured to deliver the HIFEM and RF energies to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles for treating the patient芒聙聶s hypogonadism the method comprising the steps of: positioning a patient on the seat of the device; engaging at least one of the front applicator and the rear applicator in a direction towards the patient芒聙聶s pelvic region; -22- IM-#10424560.1 

 Attorney Docket No.: 0007553.000004 generating the HIFEM and RF energies using HIFEM and RF generators; delivering, when at least one of the front applicator and the rear applicator is engaged with the patient, the HIFEM energy from the engaged applicator to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles; concurrently delivering the RF energy from the engaged applicator to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles; and adjusting the intensity of the delivering of the HIFEM energy and the RF energy based on the patient芒聙聶s comfort to treat the patient芒聙聶s hypogonadism. 10. The method of claim 9, further comprising the steps of: engaging the other of the front applicator and the rear applicator in a direction towards the patient芒聙聶s pelvic region; generating the HIFEM and RF energies using HIFEM and RF generators; delivering, when the other of the front applicator and the rear applicator is engaged with the patient, the HIFEM energy from the other engaged applicator to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles; concurrently delivering the RF energy from the other engaged applicator to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles; and adjusting the intensity of the delivering of the HIFEM energy and the RF energy based on the patient芒聙聶s comfort to treat the patient芒聙聶s hypogonadism. 11. The method of claims 9 or 10, wherein the seat further comprises a seat applicator, the seat applicator being configured to deliver HIFEM and RF energies, the method further comprising the steps of: delivering, from the seat applicator, the HIFEM energy to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles; concurrently delivering the RF energy from the seat applicator to the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles; and adjusting the intensity of the delivering of the HIFEM energy and the RF energy based on the patient芒聙聶s comfort to treat the patient芒聙聶s hypogonadism. 12. The method of any of claims 9-11, wherein the delivering comprises delivering the HIFEM and RF energies concurrently to the muscles and fat tissues of the patient芒聙聶s pelvic floor muscles. -23- IM-#10424560.1 

 Attorney Docket No.: 0007553.000004 13. The method of claim 11, wherein the seat applicator, the front applicator, and the rear applicator are each configured to concurrently deliver the HIFEM energy pulsed at between 1Hz to 500 Hz with a continuous application of RF energy in the range of 1 MHz to 3 MHz. 14. The method of any of claims 9-13, wherein the device further comprises a control panel comprising a patient-operated button, the method further comprising the step of: terminating, using the patient-operated button, the delivery of the HIFEM and RF energies, when the patient experiences discomfort during treatment. 15. The method of claim 13, wherein the seat applicator, the front applicator, and the rear applicator are each configured to deliver the HIFEM energy and RF energy for a duration of 10 to 30 minutes long, depending on the patient芒聙聶s comfort level. 16.
